summary: Critical issues: (1) `actions/checkout@v4` is NOT pinned to full 40-character SHA—explicit requirement violated. (2) Test files missing entirely: task requires `tests/test_artifact_cleanup.py` with 8 test cases (max_age_policy, keep_latest_n, etc.), but deliverable has only the harness that references non-existent test outputs. (3) TDD not demonstrated—no test-first approach shown. (4) Workflow can't actually run: pytest will fail looking for `tests/` dir; act would hang. (5) Unusual pip flag `--break-system-packages` non-idiomatic. (6) No error propagation in workflow steps. Python code itself (artifact_cleanup.py) is well-structured and readable, but deliverable is incomplete and doesn't meet stated requirements.
